# tickpedia.com — open under MIT, indexable, no surprises.
# /search is the only path we keep out of the index — it's a query
# surface, not a content URL, and we don't want it rotting search
# results with auto-generated junk.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /search

Sitemap: https://tickpedia.com/sitemap.xml
